subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who is singular in His bounty and unique in His beneficence, Who is sanctified above whatsoever the peoples of contingent being may utter, and is holy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لحمد لله الذی تفرد بالفضل و توحد بالاحسان و منزه عما ینطق به اهل الامکان و تقدس
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
